name: hash_file
description: Compute MD5, SHA1, and SHA256 checksums of a file
command: echo '=== Checksums for {{file}} ===' && echo "MD5:    $(md5sum '{{file}}' | awk '{print $1}')" && echo "SHA1:   $(sha1sum '{{file}}' | awk '{print $1}')" && echo "SHA256: $(sha256sum '{{file}}' | awk '{print $1}')" && echo "Size:   $(ls -lh '{{file}}' | awk '{print $5}')"
